prompt: {"type":"minimal skincare brand book spread","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"rhode\"}","industry":"skincare","style":"quiet luxury, clean, editorial, minimalist, soft neutral tones"},"canvas":{"background":"very light warm gray","format":"wide landscape presentation board","grid":"2 rows x 3 columns","count":6,"gutters":"thin white spacing between panels"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"cover","position":"top-left","count":1,"elements":["cropped beauty portrait of a woman with slicked-back dark hair and visible ear, neck, and shoulder","large lowercase wordmark over the portrait","small subtitle reading brand kit and a season-year line","soft taupe-gray background","a large square color block overlay obscuring the center-left of the face"]},{"title":"01. OUR BRAND","position":"top-center","count":1,"elements":["small section number and title at top","left-aligned paragraph block","headline stating that the brand is a skincare brand with one of everything really good","short supporting body copy in small light gray text","large creamy skincare smear image on the right side"]},{"title":"02. BRAND PILLARS","position":"top-right","count":1,"elements":["small section number and title at top","4 icon-and-text columns","labels: ESSENTIAL, EFFECTIVE, INTENTIONAL, INCLUSIVE","icons: tube, smiley face, heart, interlocking circles","one short descriptor paragraph under each pillar"]},{"title":"03. VISUAL IDENTITY","position":"bottom-left","count":1,"elements":["small section number and title at top","large central lowercase wordmark","logo variations row with 3 variants","labels for supporting subareas including logo, logo variation, clear space, minimum size","clear space diagram","minimum size example"]},{"title":"04. COLOR PALETTE","position":"bottom-center","count":1,"elements":["small section number and title at top","5 vertical rectangular color swatches","labels: PEPTIDE GRAY, GLAZE, VANILLA SKIN, PINK GLAZE, TOAST","tiny specification lines under each swatch"]},{"title":"05. TYPOGRAPHY","position":"bottom-right","count":1,"elements":["small section number and title at top","large sample text for primary typeface","primary typeface name shown as {argument name=\"primary typeface\" default=\"NEUE HAAS GROTESK\"}","alphabet and numerals sample","3 weight samples labeled 55 ROMAN, 65 MEDIUM, 75 BOLD with the line 'The quick brown fox'","secondary typeface line showing Georgia Regular","small usage notes blocks"]}],"footer":"tiny page markers and brand kit captions on each panel"},"palette":{"overall":["warm off-white","light gray","taupe","beige","blush pink","soft brown"]},"typography":{"wordmark":"bold rounded lowercase sans serif","body":"small understated editorial sans serif","mood":"premium, restrained, airy"},"rendering":{"look":"high-end brand guidelines presentation mockup","lighting":"soft flat studio lighting","detail":"crisp layout, subtle contrast, lots of negative space"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"极简护肤品牌手册排版","brand":{"name":"{argument name=\"brand name\" default=\"rhode\"}","industry":"护肤","style":"静奢风、干净、编辑感、极简主义、柔和中性色调"},"canvas":{"background":"极浅暖灰色","format":"宽屏横向演示项目","grid":"2 行 x 3 列","count":6,"gutters":"面板间细白间距"},"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"封面","position":"左上","count":1,"elements":["女性美容特写，梳着后梳深色发型，露出耳朵、颈部和肩膀","肖像上方大号小写字标","小标题显示品牌指南及季节年份行","柔和灰褐色背景","一个遮盖脸部左中位置的大型方形色块覆盖层"]},{"title":"01. 品牌介绍","position":"中上","count":1,"elements":["顶部小节编号和标题","左对齐段落块","标题声明该品牌是一个追求精简、品质至上的护肤品牌","小号浅灰色文本的简短正文","右侧大面积奶油质感护肤品涂抹图"]},{"title":"02. 品牌支柱","position":"右上","count":1,"elements":["顶部小节编号和标题","4 列图标与文本","标签：ESSENTIAL（核心）、EFFECTIVE（高效）、INTENTIONAL（专注）、INCLUSIVE（包容）","图标：软管、笑脸、爱心、互锁圆环","每个支柱下方一段简短的描述性文字"]},{"title":"03. 视觉识别","position":"左下","count":1,"elements":["顶部小节编号和标题","中央大号小写字标","包含 3 种变体的标志变体行","包括标志、标志变体、留白区域、最小尺寸在内的辅助区域标签","留白区域示意图","最小尺寸示例"]},{"title":"04. 色彩方案","position":"中下","count":1,"elements":["顶部小节编号和标题","5 个垂直矩形色块","标签：PEPTIDE GRAY（肽灰）、GLAZE（釉光）、VANILLA SKIN（香草肌）、PINK GLAZE（粉釉）、TOAST（烤色）","每个色块下方细小的规格说明线"]},{"title":"05. 字体排版","position":"右下","count":1,"elements":["顶部小节编号和标题","主字体大号示例文本","主字体名称显示为 {argument name=\"primary typeface\" default=\"NEUE HAAS GROTESK\"}","字母和数字示例","3 种字重样本，标注为 55 ROMAN、65 MEDIUM、75 BOLD，并附带 'The quick brown fox' 样句","显示 Georgia Regular 的次级字体行","小型用法说明块"]}],"footer":"每个面板上的微型页面标记和品牌指南说明"},"palette":{"overall":["暖米白","浅灰","灰褐","米色","腮红粉","柔棕"]},"typography":{"wordmark":"粗体圆润小写无衬线字体","body":"小型低调的编辑风格无衬线字体","mood":"高端、克制、通透"},"rendering":{"look":"高端品牌指南演示样机","lighting":"柔和均匀的摄影棚光效","detail":"清晰的排版、微妙的对比度、大量的留白"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 极简护肤品牌指南项目：一个为高端护肤品牌设计的简洁编辑风格品牌指南项目，适用于生成极简主义的品牌形象演示文稿和情绪板。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: grid, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: editorial, minimalist, luxury, premium, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明；文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
